title: cyperus erinaceus
intro: Cyperus erinaceus, also known as the Shan Zhu Yu or the Wolfberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic effects. The health benefits of Cyperus erinaceus include improving cardiovascular health, boosting immune system function, and potentially reducing the risk of age-related diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Cyperus erinaceus can be prepared into various herbal products, including capsules, tablets, and tea, making it a popular supplement among health-conscious individuals.
